strings.welcome_back: Welcome back! You're still verified from your last visit.
strings.choose_method_prompt: Please choose either (1) email verification or (2) booking reference.
strings.code_sent: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to your email. It expires in a few minutes.
strings.account_not_found: We couldn't find an account with that email. Please double-check or try verifying with your booking reference instead.
strings.invalid_email: That doesn't look like a valid email address. Please try again.
strings.booking_ref_mismatch: We couldn't match that booking reference and last name.
strings.auth_success: You're verified! Let me connect you with our booking specialist.
strings.account_locked:
For your security, verification has been temporarily locked after 3 failed attempts.
Our support team has been notified and will reach out to help.
You can also call us directly at 1-800-TRAVELDESK for immediate assistance.
strings.speak_to_human: Let me connect you with a support agent.
strings.cancel: No problem! Come back anytime you need help.
